title: Kensuke playing with a toy plane in 24 different dubs

[]: Kensuke playing with a toy plane in 24 different dubs             Quote Post by GlassReality45 » Fri Jan 08, 2021 12:08 pm ...I dunno what else to say on this one, really. It speaks for itself. https://drive.google.com/file/d/1m61-6r ... sp=sharing

[]: Re: Kensuke playing with a toy plane in 24 different dubs             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jan 08, 2021 12:20 pm Doctor: "You have [this video's duration in minutes] minutes left." Me: *opens this video* Did I properly meme? I didn't expect these to be so different from each other lol.

[]: Re: Kensuke playing with a toy plane in 24 different dubs             Quote Post by Berserker » Fri Jan 08, 2021 12:25 pm Wow, never even thought this getting a compilation of itself. Though it was kinda weirdly entertaining.

[]: Re: Kensuke playing with a toy plane in 24 different dubs             Quote Post by GlassReality45 » Fri Jan 08, 2021 12:27 pm kuribo-04 wrote: I didn't expect these to be so different from each other lol.

[]: Re: Kensuke playing with a toy plane in 24 different dubs             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Fri Jan 08, 2021 1:54 pm In the Galician version it looked like a cat fighting over some roof. While in my country's version, I thought Rafael was lazy in his interpretation for Animax dub, but he made a good perform in the Netflix version.

[]: Re: Kensuke playing with a toy plane in 24 different dubs             Quote Post by Javi2541997 » Tue Jan 19, 2021 2:30 am This video is so interesting because we barely have a brief content from class 2-A mates (Kensuke, Toji and Horaki). It was so cool to see.
